name: knowledge-vue
description: The developer's Vue conventions as intent-triggered skills (architecture-fsd, modals, vue-router, pages, layouts, page-middlewares, stores, persistence, hydration, ssr, http-request, tanstack-query, auth, forms, form-elements, plugin-registration, project-init, plus seo and robots delivery) placed via location tokens. Depends on the knowledge base plugin (capture) and knowledge-seo (SEO principles, delivered into Vue without being asked).
